name: fabrika-content-workbench
description: Фабрика Контента — редакторская платформа для управления контентом

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w app"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w app" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.build: npm run build -w app && npm run build -w server && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run rebuild && npx electron-builder --linux
